author: OpenAI Codex
name: Hybrid Retentive Memory + TriGram Hash + Routed SwiGLU
blurb: Exploratory non-record submission that extends the SmearGate/BigramHash recipe with trigram hash embeddings, a retention-style recurrent memory branch, a causal depthwise convolution mixer, and a small soft-routed SwiGLU MLP. Intended as a modern hybrid LLM starting point for future parameter-golf tuning rather than a claimed leaderboard result.
